title: Futuristic Loading Screens
description: Instead of the basic and boring loading screens we know and see so often they have been replaced by high quality futuristic minecraft cities, enjoy!
body:
Loading Screens - Futuristic

This is a resourcepack for the Loading Backgrounds Mod. This resourcepack adds many Futuristic themed images to your background when loading up your minecraft worlds.

Requires the mod: Loading Backgrounds

Can this be used on a server? Yes, it works on servers.


Patreon: [https://www.patreon.com/Swaix](https://www.patreon.com/Swaix)
